changeSet.author: MARKETING
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE USERS ( ID SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, FULL_NAME VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, USERNAME VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL, EMAIL VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL, PHONE_NUMBER INTEGER, ADDRESS VARCHAR(255), PASSWORD VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, ROLE VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL );

changeSet.author: MARKETING
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO USERS (FULL_NAME, USERNAME, EMAIL, PHONE_NUMBER, ADDRESS, PASSWORD, ROLE) VALUES ('John Doe', 'johndoe', 'john.doe@example.com', 1234567890, '123 Main St', 'password123', 'USER');
